sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 1097 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.15 & 26. 2. For orders on CMA No.2400/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Naseer Ahmed Abbasi, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice his not been sought / issued till date. Today Mr. Naseer Ahmed Abbasi, advocate has appeared devoid of any Vakalatnama and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
